description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the adoptopenjdk:11-jdk-hotspot Docker image, sets GRADLE_OPTS, GRADLE_USER_HOME and KONAN_DATA_DIR variables, and defines a cache with key one-key-to-rule-them-all covering $GRADLE_USER_HOME/wrapper/dists/, $GRADLE_USER_HOME/caches/modules-2/ and $GRADLE_USER_HOME/caches/build-cache-1/. Add a before_script that runs rm -f $GRADLE_USER_HOME/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock and rm -f $GRADLE_USER_HOME/caches/build-cache-1/build-cache-1.lock. In the build stage create a build job that runs only on the master branch, executes ./gradlew build, and publishes the JAR files matching build/libs/*.jar as artifacts that expire after one week.
